applicationDescription.message: Steam order tracking is browser extension which to keep your Steam Market buy orders profitable.
applicationDescription.description: The title of the application, displayed in the web store.

aboutProgramDescription.message: The program has 4 colors:green - current price yellow - the price needs to be updated violet - it is not enough to change the price, because unprofitable red - you need to change the price.

scanSettings.description: List of settings for scanning orders.

scanInterval.description: Interval between requests to get the price of a product in milliseconds.

scanIntervalInfo.message: The interval between price scan requests must be> 1000 milliseconds.
scanIntervalInfo.description: The interval between price scan requests.

csgoFloatInterval.description: Interval between requests to get float csgo.

csgoFloatIntervalInfo.message: The interval between price scan requests must be > 1000 milliseconds. If the interval between requests is too short, then not all fleets will be displayed.
csgoFloatIntervalInfo.description: Description of the interval between requests to get float csgo.

csgoFloatAPIUrlInfo.message: Because the csgoFloat API is no longer publicly available, it needs to be self-hosted. The API must be hosted on your computer! Link:
csgoFloatAPIUrlInfo.description: Description of the link to get float csgo.

csgoFloatRunInfo.message: If the csgoFLoat API reference is not available, it will result in an error.

errorPause.description: Pause between error if didn’t get to make a request.

errorPauseInfo.description: If the request cannot be completed, the delay increases.

quantityOfItems.description: Quantity of items which you want to sell in Steam Community Market

quantityOfItemsInfo.message: Quantity of items which you want to sell in Steam Community Market.
quantityOfItemsInfo.description: A pop-up window that displays a tooltip describing the number of items.

runScanDescription.message: Choose what exactly you want to scan: 1) items for sale 2) items for sale To apply the settings, click save settings. In order for the script to apply to the page, you need to refresh it by pressing ↶ or F5, or simply re-login. Scanning will run in the background.
runScanDescription.description: Pop-up window that displays a hint to start scanning.

runSearch.description: The name of the search scan launch.

runSearchInfo.message: Add the ability to quickly search.

sizeOfHistory.description: Title descriptions number of records in history.

sizeOfHistoryInfo.message: The number of records in history should be no more than 500.
sizeOfHistoryInfo.description: Pop-up window that displays a hint for the size of the story.

displayHistoryInfo.message: Display history on the same tab as buy orders.
displayHistoryInfo.description: A pop-up window that displays a history display hint.

steamAppKeyInfo.description: A pop-up window which describes how to get appKey.

buyListingColorCGood.description: The color of the purchase order when the order is profitable.

buyListingColorCGoodInfo.message: The color of the purchase order when there is no need to update the price. The order has a higher profit ratio than specified in the settings.
buyListingColorCGoodInfo.description: A description of the color of the purchase order when the order is profitable.

buyListingColorCUpdate.description: The color of the purchase order when the price needs to be updated.

buyListingColorCUpdateInfo.message: Color of the purchase order when the price needs to be updated. Your price is lower than the current purchase order. If you update the price, the profit factor will still be higher than specified in the settings.
buyListingColorCUpdateInfo.description: A description of the color of the purchase order when the price needs to be updated.

buyListingColorCNotUpdate.description: The color of the purchase order when the price should not be updated otherwise the order will not be profitable.

buyListingColorCNotUpdateInfo.message: The color of the purchase order when there is no need to update the price, otherwise you may get a profit less than what you specified in the settings or go into a loss.
buyListingColorCNotUpdateInfo.description: A description of the color of the purchase order when the price should not be updated otherwise the order will not be profitable.

buyListingColorCBad.description: The color of the purchase order when to cancel an order or charge less.

buyListingColorCBadInfo.message: The color of the purchase order when you need to update the price or cancel the order, otherwise you may get a profit less than what you specified in the settings or go into a loss.
buyListingColorCBadInfo.description: A description of the color of the purchase order when to cancel an order or charge a lower price.

buyListingColorCUnknown.description: Purchase order color when profit cannot be calculated.

buyListingColorCUnknownInfo.message: Purchase order color when profit cannot be calculated.
buyListingColorCUnknownInfo.description: A description of the purchase order color when profit cannot be calculated.

saleListingColorCGood.description: The color of the sell order when your sell price is less than the others.

saleListingColorCGoodInfo.message: Colors for a sell order when your sell price is lower than the others.
saleListingColorCGoodInfo.description: A description of the sales order color when your sell price is less than the others.

saleListingColorCBad.description: The color of the sell order when your price is higher than the current one.

saleListingColorCBadInfo.message: Colors for a sell order when your price is higher than the current one.
saleListingColorCBadInfo.description: A description of the sales order color when your price is higher than the current one.

saleListingColorCUnknown.description: Sales order color when your sales order is single.

saleListingColorCUnknownInfo.message: Colors for a sales order when your sales order is single. You can set any price for it.
saleListingColorCUnknownInfo.description: A description of the sales order color when your sales order is single.

searchListingColorCProfitable.description: Search color when you can profit.

searchListingColorCProfitableInfo.message: The color of the block in the search when you can profit more than the ratio you specified in the settings.
searchListingColorCProfitableInfo.description: Description of the search color when you can profit.

searchListingColorCBitProfitable.description: Search color when your profit is less than the specified ratio.

searchListingColorCBitProfitableInfo.message: The color of the block in the search when your profit is less than the specified ratio.
searchListingColorCBitProfitableInfo.description: A description of the search color when your profit is less than the specified ratio.

searchListingColorCNotProfitableInfo.message: The color of the block in the search when you don't make a profit on the sale.
searchListingColorCNotProfitableInfo.description: Description of the search color when not profitable.

buttonSave.description: Save settings for scanning a buy order.

priceWithoutCommissionDescription.description: Description prices without commission of the order displayed when scanning.

NextBuyOrderPricenDescription.message: The following price of the request to buy:
NextBuyOrderPricenDescription.description: The next buy request price that is higher than the current price.

profitAtTheMomentDescription.description: Description of the profit currently displayed when scanning an order.

coefficientPriceAtTheMomentDescription.description: Description of the minimum profit currently displayed when scanning an order.

salesInOneDay.description: Description of the number of sales in 1 days.

salesInSevenDays.description: Description of the number of sales in 7 days.

myPriceDescription.description: Description of the my price when scanning an order.

myPriceWithCurrencyDescription.description: Description of the my price with currency when scanning an order.

myProfitDescription.description: Description of the my profit when scanning an order.

myCoefficientPriceDescription.description: Description of the my minimum profit when scanning an order.

myQuantityQuantity_remainingDescription.message: How much was / left to buy:
myQuantityQuantity_remainingDescription.description: Hint how many were zakov and how much is left to buy.

allTimeHistoryButton.description: A button that displays the full history of the product for all time.

countOfSalesPerDay.description: History switcher text that displays the maximum cost and number of sales per day.

countOfSalesPerDayDescription.description: Tooltip for history switcher text that displays the maximum cost and number of sales per day.

listSortingPriceFrom.description: Description of the window for entering the lower price limit.

listSortingPriceTo.description: Description of the window for entering the upper price limit.

listSortingMinCount.description: Description of the window for entering the minimum quantity of goods in stock.

listSortingMinSell.description: Description of the window for entering the minimum number of sales in 7 days.

listSortingMinProfit.description: Description of the window for entering the minimum percentage of profit.

listSortingOnlyProfitable.message: Only profitable (percentage of profit by default)
listSortingOnlyProfitable.description: We take into account the percentage of profit by default, which is specified in the extension settings.

runScanInSearchListButton.description: Button to start scanning the list of products.
